package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for time_since_candidate_via_now_sub: `time.Now().Sub(start)` instead of `time.Since(start)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario685Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
